description.en: Attacks 2 enemies, and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to grant increased <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 2인을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵2体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.zh: 攻击2名敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率使自身的<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies. Has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict irremovable <color=#28d9ed>Unbuffable</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, and a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to increase <color=#28d9ed>skill cooldowns</color> of all targets by <color=#28d9ed>2 turns</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 적 전체에게 해제 불가능한 <color=#28d9ed>강화 불가</color>를 부여하고, <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 대상 모두의 <color=#28d9ed>스킬 쿨타임</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で敵全体に解除不可能な<color=#28d9ed>強化不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間付与し、<color=#28d9ed>100%<color=#28d9ed>の確率で対象のすべての</color>スキルターン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>増加させる。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使全体敌人陷入无法被解除的<color=#28d9ed>无法强化</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>,并有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使全体目标的<color=#28d9ed>技能冷却时间</color>增加<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to remove all <color=#28d9ed>buffs</color> from all enemies, and attacks all enemies. After attacking, has a <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Reduced Defense</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>3 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 모두 해제하고 적 전체를  공격합니다. 공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 적 전체에게 <color=#28d9ed>방어력 감소</color>를 부여합니다.
description.jp: <color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>をすべて解除し、 敵全体にダメージを与える。攻撃後、敵全体に<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>防御力DOWN</color>を<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率使全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>全部解除,并攻击全体敌人。攻击后,有<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>的几率赋予全体敌人<color=#28d9ed>防御力降低</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect) Damage dealt to targets inflicted with decreased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> increases by <color=#28d9ed>80%</color>.
description.kr: (패시브 효과) <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color> 감소 상태인 대상에 대한 피해량이 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 증가합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>DOWN状態の対象へのダメージが <color=#28d9ed>80%</color>UPする。
description.zh: (被动效果)对处于<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低状态的目标造成的伤害提高<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>。

name.en: Blessing of the Tower of Light

description.en:
Always increases Penetration by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and Critical Hit Chance by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.

Grants <color=#28d9ed>Continuous Recovery</color> for <color=#28d9ed>3 turns</color> at the start of battle (Irremovable).
Reduces enemy team's CP by <color=#28d9ed>25</color> at the end of the turn.
description.kr:
항상 관통력이 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>, 치명 확률이 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가합니다

전투 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>3턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>지속 회복</color>을 부여합니다. (해제 불가)
턴 종료 시 적 팀의 CP를 <color=#28d9ed>25</color> 감소시킵니다.
description.jp:
常時貫通力が<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>、会心率が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。

戦闘開始時、<color=#28d9ed>3ターン</color>の間<color=#28d9ed>持続回復</color>を付与する。(解除不可)
ターン終了時、敵チームのCPを<color=#28d9ed>25</color>DOWNさせる。
description.zh:
穿透力始终提升<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>,暴击率始终提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>

战斗开始时,赋予<color=#28d9ed>持续恢复</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>3回合</color>。(无法解除)
回合结束时,敌队CP减少<color=#28d9ed>25</color>。
